title: Listing analyses
description: One scout finding about a listing — a photo/condition read, a floor-plan measurement, or a description-vs-evidence mismatch check. Always cited to what was actually observed; never invented.

kind.description: 'photos' (condition/light/staging read) | 'floorplan' (measured size + layout red flags) | 'mismatch' (description vs photos/plan/fields contradictions)

body.description: md — the findings, each cited to its evidence ('caption on photo 4 says…', 'room dims sum to 71 m² vs 85 stated')

flags.description: machine-readable flags this analysis contributes, merged into listings.flags

confidence.description: 0..1 — how sure the analyst is; low-confidence findings are phrased as questions to verify at a viewing, not facts
